title: Green Blade BB-WC300 8 x 1.5m Weed Control Fabric in CDU
features: Strong and durable yet flexible, easy to cut and install
Provides a chemical free means of controlling weeds
Ultra violet resistant and water permeable
description: Product Description Green Blade cost effective, labour saving fabric is strong and durable, easy to install and will not fray. It is also environmentally friendly as it controls weeds without the need for chemicals. It will effectively help block weeds from growing and stealing valuable nutrients from your plants. It has excellent permeability allowing water, air and nutrients to get right to the root of your plants, creating healthy gardens and beautiful landscapes. Fabric measures 8m length by 1.5m width. Green Blade offers a comprehensive range of garden tools and general garden maintenance products. Highly visible branded packaging. 12 month no quibble guarantee. If you’re a novice gardener or just keen to upgrade your outdated tools, Greenblade can help. Bringing together a huge choice of equipment, so that you will find all you need, from a hardwearing pair of Gloves to a Ratchet Tree Pruner or even a Garden Cart. Greenblade provide top quality garden tools that will take the strain out of even the hardest of tasks. Box Contains 1 x Piece
